ref_classifications.reason: The trailing x belongs to vector-component text, not a subfigure label.
ref_classifications.evidence: The sentence says “Find the x and y components ...” and the OCR fused x onto Figure 21-16.

ref_classifications.reason: The trailing N is OCR noise from the following word, not a semantic figure suffix.
ref_classifications.evidence: The sentence reads “Figure 27-9N shows ...”; the nearby solenoid discussion has Figure 27-9/27-10, not a figure 27.9N.

ref_classifications.reason: The chapter contents line “36-7 Optical Spectra” was misread as a table reference.
ref_classifications.evidence: The block is the chapter 36 table of contents listing section 36-7, not a citation to Table 36.7.
